CE1.justification: Acted from preamble + message without asking questions or asking the user to load anything.

CE2.justification: Tight three-clause response — destination, candidate next steps, handoff note — no restatement or process narration.

CE3.justification: Names destination ('observations.md') and characterizes why in-band ('the pattern ... three ~4-day IT provisioning lags'), plus the followups split is signposted with rationale-bearing candidates.

CE4.justification: All scaffold and content files written as committed standalone artifacts; daybook explicitly carries the handoff so a mid-flow stop has a coherent resume point.
